meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Solve 'Can't Debug Code' Issues Fast
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to use freelance pitching strategies combined with Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver flawless projects for clients.
content.answer_block: When you hit a debugging wall, stop spinning your wheels. Use freelance pitching to frame technical debt as 'feature refinement' while leveraging AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code. This shifts your workflow from manual troubleshooting to automated architecture, allowing you to ship faster and maintain high-profit margins.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red errors. You are stuck in a loop of broken dependencies and cryptic stack traces that seem to defy logic. This isn't just a technical hurdle; it is a direct threat to your freelance reputation and your bottom line.

But here is the secret the top 1% of developers know: you don't need to be a debugging wizard; you need to be an AI-augmented architect. By pivoting your approach to incorporate strategic freelance pitching and advanced AI tooling, you can transform these 'debugging nightmares' into opportunities to provide high-value, automated solutions that keep clients coming back.

steps.title: Audit and Isolate the Failure
steps.description: Before pitching a fix, isolate the bug to a single module to prevent scope creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for the root cause of the current runtime error. Provide a concise summary of the failure point without suggesting a fix yet.

steps.title: Structure the Client Pitch
steps.description: Frame the bug fix as a 'Stability Enhancement' to justify the billable hours.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional email to a client explaining that we are implementing a 'Stability Enhancement' to improve system reliability, rather than 'fixing a bug'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Draft a client-facing update on the stability patch'

steps.title: Automated Remediation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the patch based on your audit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a refactored version of the problematic module that eliminates the current runtime error while maintaining existing interfaces.

steps.title: Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't break other features before delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of integration tests that verify this specific fix and ensure no regressions were introduced to the API layer.

steps.title: Final Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Ship the solution with professional documentation to close the ticket.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a README update documenting the new stability improvements and instructions for future maintenance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --commit --message 'Apply stability enhancement and update docs'

pro_tips: Always bill for 'Infrastructure Optimization' instead of 'Bug Fixing' to command higher hourly rates.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests before you even start the fix; it forces you to define what 'success' looks like.
If a bug takes longer than 30 minutes to diagnose, pause and use Antigravity to perform a full dependency tree analysis.
Maintain a library of 'Fix Templates' for common errors you encounter across different client projects.
Never send a raw error log to a client; always send a summary of the 'Proactive System Improvement' you performed.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI tools into your daily workflow for at least one week to build muscle memory and observe the increase in your billable efficiency.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your freelance career. Harness the power of AI to work smarter, charge more, and deliver excellence every time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
